11.response: {"Q0":"I think it examines how people's motivations change with changing circumstances. "}

7.response: {"Q0":"I felt I was more compelled to search because I wanted to know what the green ice was hiding. "}

9.response: {"Q0":"I was more focused on the planets because it took more mental power to execute the correct actions and not waste gold. "}

8.response: {"Q0":"The difference in the amount of money and the chance. If the chances were around the same I preferred the higher outcome most of the time. "}
